name: Angelechy Disturbance
desc: Give control of 1 "Angelechy" monster you control to your opponent (until the End Phase), then if your opponent controls a face-up card(s) in its adjacent Monster Zones and/or Spell & Trap Zones, their effects are negated. You can banish this card from your GY; add 1 "Angelechy" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand, except "Angelechy Disturbance". You can only use each effect of "Angelechy Disturbance" once per turn.
